scope.claim: The scaled EML/qNS experiment is a finite executable approximant of a safe infinite candidate table.
not_claimed: not a proof that Qwen candidates are true by generation alone
not full analytic Tau semantics for EML
not an exhaustive depth-5 or depth-6 search

infinite_table_reading.index_set: countable candidate stream, modeled by natural-number candidate indices
infinite_table_reading.finite_lane: this receipt materializes finite frontier prefixes only
infinite_table_reading.state: T_n(i) is the qNS evidence memory for candidate row i at approximant n
infinite_table_reading.guard: G_n(i) is fixed lower-stratum evidence: promoted rows get top, rejected rows get bottom
infinite_table_reading.replacement: A_n(i) is the fixed accepted-evidence qNS mask for row i

proof_bridge.role: finite executable lane embeds into completed reference semantics
pointwise revision law and fixed-guard discipline
checked monotone omega-continuous safe table syntax status
select/revision packet for fixed guards and replacement tables
tutorial framing for safe infinite-recursive table approximants
